title: Didache -- Prayers (Lake Translation)
tradition_notes: The Didache (Teaching of the Twelve Apostles) is an early Christian document, dated to approximately 50-120 AD, containing some of the earliest known eucharistic prayers and the Lord's Prayer doxology. The Kirsopp Lake (1912) translation is standard in scholarship and is in the public domain. This dataset covers only the prayer content from chapters 8-10.
source_edition: Kirsopp Lake translation, 1912; digitized by Wikisource contributors
notes: Scope limited to chapters 8-10 (prayer content). Chapter 8 v.2 = Lord's Prayer. Chapter 9 vv.2-4 = Eucharistic prayers over cup and bread. Chapter 10 vv.2-6 = Post-Eucharist thanksgiving. Chapters 1-7 and 11-16 contain doctrinal and ecclesiological content outside this dataset's scope.
